languages.text: {n}Ваш лоб с глухим стуком соприкасается с лбом полковника, выбивая искры из глаз обоих. Удивленный меровец размыкает объятья, отступая на два шага назад.{/n}
{n}Your forehead collides with the colonel's with a dull thud, making you both see stars. The stunned Merovian breaks his hold, staggering back a couple of paces.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваш лоб с глухим стуком соприкасается с лбом полковника, выбивая искры из глаз обоих. Удивленный меровец размыкает объятья, отступая на два шага назад.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Your forehead collides with the colonel's with a dull thud, making you both see stars. The stunned Merovian breaks his hold, staggering back two steps.{/n}
{n}Your forehead collides with the colonel's with a dull thud, making you both see stars. The stunned Merovian breaks his hold, staggering back two steps.{/n}
{n}Your forehead collides with the colonel's with a dull thud, making you both see stars. The stunned Merovian breaks his hold, staggering back a couple of paces.{/n}
{n}Your forehead collides with the colonel's with a dull thud, making you both see stars. The stunned Merovian breaks his hold, staggering back a couple of paces.{/n}
{n}Your forehead collides with the colonel's with a dull thud, making you both see stars. The stunned Merovian breaks his hold, staggering back a couple of paces.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的额头和上校的头撞在一起，发出沉闷的撞击声，震得你们两人眼冒金星。这位被撞懵的梅罗夫人松开了手，踉跄着后退了几步。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your forehead collides with the colonel's with a dull thud, making you both see stars. The stunned Merovian breaks his hold, staggering back a couple of paces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的额头和上校的头撞在一起，发出沉闷的撞击声，震得你们两人眼冒金星。这位被撞懵的梅罗夫人松开了手，踉跄着后退了几步。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Alnın, tok bir sesle albayınkiyle çarpışıyor. İkinizin de gözlerinde şimşekler çakıyor. Sersemlemiş Merovlu, tutuşunu gevşetiyor ve birkaç adım geriliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your forehead collides with the colonel's with a dull thud, making you both see stars. The stunned Merovian breaks his hold, staggering back a couple of paces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alnın, tok bir sesle albayınkiyle çarpışıyor. İkinizin de gözlerinde şimşekler çakıyor. Sersemlemiş Merovlu, tutuşunu gevşetiyor ve birkaç adım geriliyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Votre front et celui du colonel s'entrechoquent, et vous vous retrouvez tous deux sonnés. Le Merovien relâche son étreinte et recule de quelques pas en titubant.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your forehead collides with the colonel's with a dull thud, making you both see stars. The stunned Merovian breaks his hold, staggering back a couple of paces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre front et celui du colonel s'entrechoquent, et vous vous retrouvez tous deux sonnés. Le Merovien relâche son étreinte et recule de quelques pas en titubant.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tu frente impacta al coronel con un golpe sordo, haciendo que ambos veáis las estrellas. El meroviano, aturdido, suelta su agarre y retrocede unos pasos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your forehead collides with the colonel's with a dull thud, making you both see stars. The stunned Merovian breaks his hold, staggering back a couple of paces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu frente impacta al coronel con un golpe sordo, haciendo que ambos veáis las estrellas. El meroviano, aturdido, suelta su agarre y retrocede unos pasos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als deine Stirn mit einem dumpfen Schlag gegen den Kopf des Colonels prallt, seht ihr beide Sterne. Der betäubte Merovianer lässt los und taumelt einige Schritte zurück.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your forehead collides with the colonel's with a dull thud, making you both see stars. The stunned Merovian breaks his hold, staggering back a couple of paces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Als deine Stirn mit einem dumpfen Schlag gegen den Kopf des Colonels prallt, seht ihr beide Sterne. Der betäubte Merovianer lässt los und taumelt einige Schritte zurück.{/n}

languages.text: {n}お前の額が鈍く衝突し、両者とも星屑を見る。驚いたメロヴィアンは手を離し、数歩後退する。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your forehead collides with the colonel's with a dull thud, making you both see stars. The stunned Merovian breaks his hold, staggering back a couple of paces.{/n}
